profiles.name: Brazil Acaia Natural Light
profiles.description:
Generated Kaffelogic Brewroom espresso profile.

Coffee: Brazil Acaia Natural
Variant: Light (daha canlı, daha az koyu espresso)
Targets:
- Start: 26°C
- CC: 2:50 @ 152°C
- FC: 6:20 @ 204°C
- Drop: 7:40 @ 217°C
- RoR decline interval: 4:20–7:10
- Fan: 14700 rpm → 14300 rpm
- Taste target: şeker kamışı, karamel, badem

Note: Brewroom import starter profile; cup result must be adjusted by Roast Level.
